rater_lens: Balanced baseline reading of the evidence packet.
scope: Scoped to Wix Studio as the agency and enterprise web platform, including AI tooling, dev docs, security, and multi-site management surfaces.

context.rationale: Wix Studio owns site structure, business-solution connections, and broader platform context beyond a single design artifact.

trust.rationale: Wix Studio publicly foregrounds security and enterprise-grade infrastructure, which strengthens trust relative to lighter AI-native builders.

distribution.rationale: Wix has broad existing market reach and Studio is packaged for agencies and enterprises rather than needing to build distribution from scratch.

judgment.rationale: The platform can encode workflow and infrastructure choices, but scarce website strategy and creative judgment still remain largely external.

liability_governance.rationale: Public messaging around security, reliability, and multi-site management supports a stronger governance story than most peers in this cohort.

frequency.rationale: Agencies and enterprise teams managing multiple sites can use Studio continuously, not only during initial build phases.

operational_dependence.rationale: Once Studio is running an important web program, teams are likely to depend on it for recurring operational work.

system_position.rationale: The platform sits across building, publishing, business solutions, and developer extensions rather than only at the mockup layer.

switching_cost.rationale: Multi-site and enterprise use cases create more migration friction than lighter tools, even if underlying content is still somewhat portable.

budget_durability.rationale: Agency and enterprise site-platform spend is typically more durable than experimental AI tooling budgets.

model_improvement_test.rationale: Stronger models should improve Studio's AI surfaces, but the broader platform still matters because AI sits inside a larger system of action.

wrapper_risk_test.rationale: Wix Studio is clearly deeper than a wrapper, yet its visible AI layers are still subject to the same commoditization pressure affecting the category.

agent_readiness_test.rationale: The developer docs and platform breadth suggest Studio can support agent-mediated workflows better than tools with only a narrow UI surface.

accountability_test.rationale: Studio controls meaningful site operations, but it still does not own the full business outcome after launch.

outcome_depth_test.rationale: Because the platform spans publishing, management, and business solutions, Studio can influence operational and commercial outcomes more deeply than lighter builders.

limitations: This is a structured desk-research rating pass from one shared evidence packet, not an independent blinded human rater.
